**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Hongtu High Technology Co., Ltd. (commonly known as Hongtu High-Tech or Hiteker) presents a classic profile of a distressed or heavily restructured former tech conglomerate. The original Apple Inc. hallucination data has been entirely eradicated. Registered in 1998 in Nanjing's High-Tech Zone, the company holds an official 'Publicly Listed (Listed)' status with a staggering registered capital of 1.158 Billion RMB and a paid-in capital of 319 Million RMB. However, its 2024 insured workforce has collapsed to merely 35 employees. This extreme hollowing out of personnel—from what was historically a massive IT and electronics manufacturer—indicates severe operational distress, likely a consequence of delisting, bankruptcy restructuring, or the selling off of its core manufacturing assets. Today, the entity functions as an asset-light corporate holding shell, maintaining its corporate digital identity ('hiteker.com.cn') while its physical manufacturing footprint has largely evaporated.
